name: Locksmith Charley
description: A new locksmith website for Locksmith Charley (Charles Eastwood, CRL — Certified Registered Locksmith), using content from https://locksmithcharley.com/ with an updated layout and theme. The business serves residential, commercial, automotive, and safe locksmith needs, with legacy Phoenix, Arizona content and current Orlando, Florida service relevance.
personaStyleGuide: Build the site as a high-trust, premium service brand with an editorial-industrial edge. The visual anchor is oversized precision typography paired with hard-lined metallic geometry that references cut keys, lock pins, and vault mechanics. Avoid generic service-business cards and boxed grids. Use a cardless composition with full-width sectional bands, asymmetric split layouts, and bold negative space. Headlines should feel engineered and authoritative, with compact letterspacing and strong vertical rhythm. Body copy should remain highly readable and calm. Spacing should be deliberate and generous, using large breathing zones around key statements and service categories. Shadows should be restrained and crisp, more like depth from machined metal than soft SaaS elevation. Use thin divider lines, brushed-metal gradients, and controlled high-contrast surfaces instead of decorative clutter. Color should communicate trust, craftsmanship, and urgency: deep steel/navy foundations, warm brass or signal amber accents, and clean light surfaces for readability. Motion, if used, should feel mechanical and precise: subtle line reveals, sliding panels, and lockup transitions rather than floaty effects.
features: Legacy Phoenix, Arizona content with current Orlando, Florida service relevance

sections.title: Hero
sections.description: Introduce Locksmith Charley (Charles Eastwood, CRL — Certified Registered Locksmith) as the primary service identity, with an updated presentation of the locksmith business and immediate emphasis on residential, commercial, automotive, and safe locksmith needs. The copy should acknowledge the brand’s legacy Phoenix, Arizona content while establishing current Orlando, Florida service relevance.
sections.layoutHint: Full-bleed hero with massive typographic lockup on one side and abstract metallic key-cut geometry on the other; no boxed callouts, just layered editorial composition with thin rule lines and directional framing.

sections.title: Residential
sections.description: Present the residential locksmith offering using the source site’s residential service content, preserving Locksmith Charley’s established expertise and professional trust signals under Charles Eastwood, CRL — Certified Registered Locksmith.
sections.layoutHint: Wide horizontal band with oversized section title, staggered text columns, and subtle door-hardware macro texture worked into the background.

sections.title: Commercial
sections.description: Present the commercial locksmith offering using the source site’s commercial service content, keeping the tone technical, credible, and service-focused while maintaining continuity with the legacy locksmith positioning.
sections.layoutHint: Asymmetric split layout with strong vertical typography, technical divider lines, and a more architectural composition that references access control, cylinders, and panic hardware without using dashboard cards.

sections.title: Automotive
sections.description: Present the automotive locksmith offering using the source site’s automotive content, including the legacy automotive scope reflected in the original Phoenix locksmith material while keeping the page relevant to current Orlando, Florida service intent.
sections.layoutHint: Dynamic lateral composition with elongated image windows and directional linework that suggests motion, roads, and vehicle access without becoming flashy.

sections.title: Safe
sections.description: Present the safe locksmith offering using the source site’s safe and vault content, preserving the high-skill, specialist tone associated with Locksmith Charley and Charles Eastwood, CRL — Certified Registered Locksmith.
sections.layoutHint: Dense, dramatic section with oversized numerals or circular vault-inspired forms, matte metal textures, and a tighter, more secure visual cadence to signal specialty expertise.

sections.title: Phoenix to Orlando
sections.description: Clarify the relationship between the legacy Phoenix, Arizona content and the site’s current Orlando, Florida service relevance so the updated layout feels intentional rather than disconnected, preserving historical credibility while orienting the visitor to present-day geographic context.
sections.layoutHint: Editorial transition section using a clean two-region narrative split, with restrained map-line graphics or directional bands instead of cards or badges.

branding.aesthetic: Premium editorial-industrial craftsmanship with precision-driven typography, metallic restraint, and cardless service storytelling

imagery.style: High-contrast, tactile, close-cropped locksmith imagery with brushed metal surfaces, key-cut details, lock cylinders, safes, and architectural hardware photographed in a refined editorial manner
